name: Maple Pecan Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare pie crust according to package directions for one crust.
2. Refrigerate remaining pie crust for later use.
3. Preheat oven to 425 degrees.
4. Place prepared crust in a 10-inch tart pan with removable bottom or a 9-inch pie pan.
5. Press into the bottom and up sides of the pan. Trim edges if necessary.
6. In a large bowl, combine all filling ingredients; blend well.
7. Carefully pour filling into the pie crust-lined pan.
8. Bake for 40 to 50 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Cool completely.
10. In a small bowl, beat cream until soft peaks form.
11. Blend in powdered sugar and maple syrup; beat until stiff peaks form.
12. Spoon or pipe over filling.
13. Garnish with pecan halves.
14. Store in refrigerator.
